scripts.fitness:doctor: pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness whoami && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness env ls preview && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness env ls production
scripts.fitness:build:vercel: pnpm run fitness:verify && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness build --yes
scripts.fitness:deploy:preview: pnpm run fitness:verify && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness deploy
scripts.fitness:deploy:prod: pnpm run fitness:verify && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness deploy --prod
scripts.fitness:deploy:prebuilt: pnpm run fitness:build:vercel && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness deploy --prebuilt
scripts.fitness:deploy:prebuilt:prod: pnpm run fitness:build:vercel && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness deploy --prebuilt --prod
scripts.fitness:deploy:preview:logs: pnpm run fitness:verify && pnpm dlx vercel --cwd ../fawxzzy-fitness deploy --logs
